name: Starfield & Star Tracker Plugin
description: Accurate star rendering for CesiumJS with GLSL shaders (magnitude-correct brightness, B-V color mapping, proper motion, scintillation). Includes star tracker simulation (TRIAD, QUEST, ESOQ2 attitude determination) and lost-in-space triangle matching. Based on OrbPro2-ModSim star catalog.

inputs.name: epoch
inputs.description: Current epoch for proper motion correction (JD or ISO8601)

inputs.name: attitude
inputs.description: Spacecraft attitude quaternion for star tracker FOV

outputs.name: attitude_solution
outputs.description: Determined attitude from star tracker observation

catalogs: Yale Bright Star Catalog (9,110 stars, V<6.5)

shaders.star_field.vert: Vertex shader: J2000→apparent, magnitude→size, proper motion
shaders.star_field.frag: Fragment shader: B-V→RGB, Airy disk PSF, atmospheric scintillation

references: Shuster, M.D. (1981) 'Three-Axis Attitude Determination from Vector Observations'
Mortari, D. (2004) 'ESOQ2 Single-Point Algorithm for Fast Optimal Spacecraft Attitude Determination'
